response.justification: Strong, broad full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) plus solid TypeScript and AWS background. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and the candidate's hands-on AI work appears to be only recent (since 2025). Python is not listed, and there is no demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, data pipelines, or customer-facing technical discovery — all core requirements. A maybe pending verification of depth in GenAI delivery and cloud AI systems.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack/systems engineering with strong testing and craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD)
Recent, directly relevant work on MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling
Solid TypeScript and AWS (CDK) cloud experience
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years of production AI/ML solutions; AI work appears very recent
Python and RAG/vector-database experience not evidenced
Customer-facing technical-leadership and discovery responsibilities not shown
